# Sprint [N] — Definition of Success

**Sprint Owner:** Mace (Producer)  
**Sprint Theme:** [e.g., Art Phase, UI/UX, Audio+VFX]  
**Sprint Duration:** [Start Date] to [End Date]  
**Target Ship Date:** [Day X]

---

## Success Criteria (all must be true to close the sprint satisfied)

### Functional Criteria
What gameplay features must work by sprint end?
- [ ] [Feature 1 — specific, testable]
- [ ] [Feature 2 — specific, testable]
- [ ] [Feature 3 — specific, testable]

### Technical Criteria (Quality Gates)
What quality bars must be met?
- [ ] All milestone gates (M[X]-M[Y]) passed
- [ ] CI/Integration tests passing (0 P0 bugs open)
- [ ] Performance target met (e.g., 60 FPS, <300ms load time)
- [ ] Code review: all PRs approved by [Reviewer name]
- [ ] No merge conflicts with main
- [ ] Branch hygiene: feature branches cleaned up post-merge

### Quality Criteria (Feel, Polish, Playtesting)
What does the build feel like?
- [ ] [Playtester name] playtest verdict: [PASS / PASS WITH NOTES / FAIL]
- [ ] Placeholder art / final art asset standard met
- [ ] Audio/SFX/Music integration (if applicable): [status]
- [ ] No major bugs blocking core loop
- [ ] Animation smoothness / frame rate stability verified

### Documentation Criteria
What docs must be written/updated?
- [ ] GDD updated (if scope changed)
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated (if tech changed)
- [ ] now.md reflects actual current state
- [ ] Dev Diary / Release Notes posted
- [ ] Decision documents filed (if major choices made)
- [ ] Agent histories updated with learnings

### Ship Criteria (When can we close?)
- [ ] All functional criteria met
- [ ] All technical criteria passed
- [ ] All quality criteria signed off
- [ ] All documentation current
- [ ] [Founder/Creative Director name] approval (if required)
- [ ] Git tag created: `git tag -a sprint-[N]-shipped -m "[Description]"`

---

## Verification Checklist (FILL OUT AT SPRINT END)

### Functional Verification
| Criteria | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [Feature 1] | ✅/❌ | [Evidence: test result, PR link, playtest note] |
| [Feature 2] | ✅/❌ | [Evidence] |
| [Feature 3] | ✅/❌ | [Evidence] |

### Technical Verification
| Gate | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| M[X] milestone | ✅/❌ | [PR links, commit hashes] |
| M[Y] milestone | ✅/❌ | [PR links, commit hashes] |
| P0 bugs | ✅ (0 open) / ❌ ([list]) | [Closed issue links] |
| Performance target | ✅/❌ | [Benchmark results] |
| Code review | ✅/❌ | [Reviewers, approval links] |

### Quality Verification
| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Playtest verdict | [PASS/NOTES/FAIL] | [Playtester name, date, key findings] |
| Asset standard | ✅/❌ | [Screenshot/video, placeholder vs final status] |
| Feel assessment | [1-10 score] | [What feels good, what needs tuning] |

---

**Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]  
**Summary:** [1-2 sentence plain English summary of what shipped and why]

**Key Deliverables:**
- [Deliverable 1]
- [Deliverable 2]
- [Deliverable 3]

**Known Limitations (acceptable for this sprint):**
- [Item 1 — why we deferred it]
- [Item 2 — why we deferred it]

**Critical Follow-ups (for next sprint):**
- [ ] [Action item from playtest or tech debt]
- [ ] [Action item]

### What Went Well
- [Pattern 1 that accelerated delivery]
- [Pattern 2]

### What Went Wrong
- [Issue 1 that slowed us down — root cause]
- [Issue 2]

### Process Improvements
